title: A Clear B2B Supply Process
description: A simple showroom-led workflow for hotels, purchasing teams, designers, and hospitality operators.

steps.title: Choose textile products
steps.description: Review the bed, bath, and decorative textile ranges that suit your rooms.

steps.title: Contact us
steps.description: Send your preferred products, quantities, sizes, and project notes.

steps.title: Receive an offer
steps.description: We prepare a clear proposal with product options and supply details.

steps.title: Confirm order details
steps.description: Finalize quantities, materials, colors, sizing, and delivery expectations.

steps.title: Delivery arrangement
steps.description: Coordinate supply timing for hotel rooms, suites, spa areas, or project phases.
